history.content: Startup status: task and schedule backends are currently unavailable in this snapshot, so there are no live task/schedule entries to act on directly. Today’s notes emphasize that memory sync correctly no-op’d to avoid low-signal duplicates, and that intermittent/missing intraday logs should be handled gracefully. Last session left off after diagnosing the X→Telegram hang as an `Unknown tool` (`browser_send_to_telegram`) plus an incomplete fallback step, alongside clarification of runtime context/compaction behavior.
